starters.name: Garlic Bread & Cheese
starters.description: Toasted artisan bread smothered in garlic butter and topped with a molten blend of melted cheeses.

starters.name: Oyster Kilpatrick
starters.description: Freshly shucked oysters topped with crispy bacon and our signature tangy Worcestershire-based sauce.

starters.name: Jalapeno Poppers (6pcs)
starters.description: Spicy jalapenos stuffed with rich cream cheese, breaded and fried until golden and crunchy.

starters.name: Loaded Wedges with Bacon Creamy Cheese
starters.description: Crispy potato wedges topped with smoky bacon bits and smothered in a velvety cheese sauce.

starters.name: Krispy Seafood Gyoza
starters.description: Japanese-style seafood dumplings, pan-seared to perfection for a delicate crunch.

starters.name: Crispy Mac & Cheese balls (6pcs)
starters.description: Gooey, house-made mac and cheese rolled into panko crumbs and fried to melty perfection.

starters.name: Arancini with Cheese Chorizo and Mix Herbs (6pcs)
starters.description: Savory risotto balls stuffed with spicy chorizo, melted cheese, and fresh garden herbs.

starters.name: Krispy Filled Mushroom with sweet chili aioli
starters.description: Plump mushrooms filled with a savory center, fried crispy and served with a zesty sweet chili aioli.

starters.name: Krispy Lemon Pepper Calamari
starters.description: Tender calamari rings lightly dusted in lemon pepper seasoning and fried for a light, zesty crunch.

starters.name: Cheese Sticks served with crisp garden salad
starters.description: Breaded mozzarella sticks pulled to stringy perfection, balanced with a fresh, crisp side salad.

starters.name: Krispy Chicken Wings (choice of flavor)
starters.description: Jumbo wings fried crisp and tossed in your choice of our signature Pit sauces.

starters.name: Tapas Board (To Share)
starters.description: A curated selection of our finest starters, perfect for sampling the best of the Pit with friends.

salad.name: Caesar Salad
salad.description: Crisp cos lettuce, crunchy croutons, and parmesan shavings tossed in a creamy Caesar dressing.

salad.name: Add Prawn (to salad)
salad.description: Succulent grilled prawns to add a touch of the ocean to your greens.

salad.name: Add Chicken (to salad)
salad.description: Tender grilled chicken breast strips to make your salad a hearty meal.

mains.name: 300g Pitch Black Angus Porterhouse Steak
mains.description: Premium Black Angus porterhouse, flame-grilled to your liking with a rich, beefy flavor profile.

mains.name: 300g BBQ Pitch Black Angus Porterhouse Steak
mains.description: Our premium Angus porterhouse glazed with house BBQ sauce for an authentic smoky finish.

mains.name: Sticky Pork Bourbon BBQ Ribs
mains.description: Fall-off-the-bone pork ribs basted in a rich, sweet Bourbon-infused BBQ glaze.

mains.name: BBQ Ribs / Beef & Pork (GF)
mains.description: A gluten-free feast of slow-smoked beef and pork ribs dripping in our signature BBQ sauce.

mains.name: Heaven Board (BBQ Beef & Pork Ribs & Half Chicken)
mains.description: The ultimate sampler: a massive helping of beef ribs, pork ribs, and wood-fired half chicken.

mains.name: BBQ Mix Grill
mains.description: A carnivore's dream featuring a selection of our best wood-fired meats and smoked sausages.

mains.name: Slow Roasted BBQ Beef Brisket
mains.description: Low and slow smoked for 12 hours over Jarrah wood until butter-tender and full of smoky depth.

mains.name: Slow Roasted Pork Ribs
mains.description: Tender pork ribs slow-cooked in the pit to preserve maximum juiciness and flavor.

mains.name: Slow Roasted Pork Ribs & BBQ Ribs
mains.description: A double hit of ribs: traditional slow-roasted pork paired with our glazed BBQ ribs.

poultry.name: Traditional Chicken Parmigiana
poultry.description: Crumbed chicken breast topped with rich tomato sugo and a generous layer of melted mozzarella.

poultry.name: Chicken Schnitzel with Salad and Beer Battered Chips
poultry.description: Hand-crumbed golden chicken schnitzel served with a side of crispy beer-battered fries.

poultry.name: Char Grill BBQ Half Chicken
poultry.description: Succulent half chicken, marinated and char-grilled over open flames for a smoky, tender finish.

fishermans_catch.name: Grilled Tasmanian Salmon
fishermans_catch.description: Fresh Tasmanian salmon fillet grilled to perfection, boasting a crispy skin and flaky center.

fishermans_catch.name: Grilled WA Barramundi
fishermans_catch.description: Locally sourced WA Barramundi, lightly seasoned and grilled to highlight its delicate, clean flavor.

fishermans_catch.name: Snapper Fish & Chips
fishermans_catch.description: Local Snapper in a light, crispy batter, served with lemon and chunky beer-battered chips.

fishermans_catch.name: Creamy Garlic Prawn
fishermans_catch.description: Plump, juicy prawns simmered in a rich and decadent garlic cream sauce.

burgers_and_sandwiches.name: Gourmet Beef Burger
burgers_and_sandwiches.description: A thick, juicy beef patty with fresh lettuce, tomato, cheese, and our secret burger sauce on a toasted bun.

burgers_and_sandwiches.name: Chicken Burger
burgers_and_sandwiches.description: Grilled or crispy chicken breast with fresh greens and creamy aioli on a soft brioche bun.

burgers_and_sandwiches.name: Steak Sandwich
burgers_and_sandwiches.description: Tender steak strips with caramelized onions, lettuce, and cheese between toasted artisan bread.

burgers_and_sandwiches.name: Parmy Burger
burgers_and_sandwiches.description: The best of both worlds: a full chicken parmigiana inside a toasted burger bun.

burgers_and_sandwiches.name: Schnitzel BLT & Cheese
burgers_and_sandwiches.description: Crispy chicken schnitzel layered with smoky bacon, fresh lettuce, tomato, and melted cheese.

heaven_boards_family_to_share.name: Heaven Board Family To Share
heaven_boards_family_to_share.description: An epic feast for the whole family, featuring a mountain of ribs, brisket, chicken, and all the sides.

heaven_boards_family_to_share.name: Heaven Seafood Board Family To Share
heaven_boards_family_to_share.description: The ultimate ocean platter: grilled fish, prawns, calamari, and seafood gyozas for the whole table.

bbq_table.name: Unlimited Grill (per pax)
bbq_table.description: The full Pit experience: an endless supply of our premium grilled meats served straight to your table.

bbq_table.name: Grill for 2 (BBQ Table)
bbq_table.description: A generous shared platter of our best wood-fired cuts, perfectly portioned for two people.

bbq_table.name: Grill for 3 (BBQ Table)
bbq_table.description: A massive wood-fired meat feast designed to satisfy a group of three hungry BBQ lovers.

bbq_table.name: Grill for 4 (BBQ Table)
bbq_table.description: The heavy hitter: a huge assortment of smoked and grilled meats perfect for a party of four.

bbq_table.name: Hot Pot Only (Unlimited)
bbq_table.description: Warm your soul with an unlimited supply of our house-made, slow-simmered pit-style hot pot.

kids_corner.name: Kids Burger & Chips
kids_corner.description: A junior-sized beef burger with cheese, served with a side of golden chips.

kids_corner.name: Kids Chicken & Chips
kids_corner.description: Tender, bite-sized chicken pieces served with a mountain of crispy chips.

kids_corner.name: Kids Fish & Chips
kids_corner.description: A small portion of battered fish and chips, perfect for little explorers.

kids_corner.name: Nugget & Chips (Kids)
kids_corner.description: Classic golden chicken nuggets served with a side of crunchy fries.

sides.name: Basket of chips
sides.description: A generous basket of our signature thick-cut, beer-battered golden fries.

sides.name: Basket Onion Rings
sides.description: Thick-cut onion rings dipped in batter and fried until ultra-crunchy.

sides.name: Buttered Vegetables
sides.description: A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables tossed in rich, melted butter.

sides.name: Broccoli & Cauliflower Gratin
sides.description: Tender broccoli and cauliflower baked in a creamy cheese sauce with a golden crust.

extras.name: Egg (extra)
extras.description: A perfectly fried egg to top off any burger or steak.

extras.name: Rice (extra)
extras.description: A side of fluffy, steamed white rice.

extras.name: Salad (extra)
extras.description: An extra serving of our fresh, crisp garden salad.

extras.name: Veggies (extra)
